text:
Created attachment 239192
'git diff --cached' results for new port -> pfSense-pkg-DNSleaktest

Add new port sysutils/pfSense-pkg-DNSleaktest

The DNSleaktest utility is used to test whether or not there is a dns leak on any outgoing interface.

WWW: https://github.com/z3d6380/pfSense-pkg-DNSleaktest
